summary.concern: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — 18 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 59 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 31 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 22 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 18. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 7 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $21,177 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Ginger Brown:** 8 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 8 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Brandy Sexton (CNG2025-508):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 6. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $16,180 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 4. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $18,981 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 3. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. 3 payment tasks due this week.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

140 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **59 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 44 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$47,714 in payments going out this week** across 28 tasks — make sure funds are available. $28,442 expected in from 3 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Stephanie and Marc Felton and Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 13. Keep the momentum going.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 18 overdue — oldest first. **4 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 16 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 4 overdue — oldest first. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Down to 3 overdue — good. Close them out today. 15 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is carrying 17 overdue, higher than their recent average. Time to clear the backlog.
**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 8 overdue — oldest first. **14 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 23 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
